steps.title: Attach the opening phrase
steps.content: The sentence begins with the introductory noun phrase "A painting by 19th-century artist Katsushika Hokusai." The main clause that follows must name that painting as the subject so the introduction has something grammatical to modify.

steps.title: Reject mismatched subjects
steps.content: A makes "deeper thematic meaning" the subject. B makes the meaning the subject by using a possessive title. C makes "visual allegory" the subject. None properly attaches the opening phrase to the painting itself. The answer is D.
